commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the workspace `node-domexception` override to `1.0.0` while also touching 64 files across dependency metadata, Google Meet, Telegram, outbound delivery, account lookup, doctor docs/CLI, scripts, tests, and workflows.

PR surface: Source -511, Tests -1247, Docs -30, Config -1, Other -36. Total -1825 across 64 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the dependency surface by source, registry, issue logs, and PR screenshots; no live install was run because this was a read-only checkout review.
